response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with ~15 years of broad engineering experience and genuine developer-tooling depth (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, MCP code generators). However, this is a Level II people-management role, and the resume shows no direct people-management experience — no reports, performance reviews, one-on-ones, or formal team leadership. Titles are consistently 'Developer/Engineer,' not management. The strong tooling and technical fit is offset by a clear gap on the core people-leadership requirement, so he is borderline rather than a confident yes.
strengths: Deep developer-tools and testing-infrastructure background (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD, GitLab/Docker setup)
Exceeds the 8-year development experience bar with broad full-stack, mobile (iOS/Apple TV), and embedded work
Demonstrated technical mentorship via workshops, courses, and Refactoring Dojos
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report experience (role requires 2+ years)
No evidence of leading organizational change or formal technical-lead authority over teams
Limited recent mobile-platform depth; current career gap since October 2025
